listeners.purpose: Emit a structured `geofence.evaluated` log line via the app logger (workspace_id, branch_id, result, mode, distance_m, accuracy_m, subject_type, subject_id). Sync so the log lands in the same request context. Sampled to 100% by default — volumes are moderate.
Emit metrics: increment academorix.geofence.evaluations.total by (result, mode), observe academorix.geofence.evaluation.duration_ms + academorix.geofence.distance_to_fence_m.
Mint a new INSIDE GeofenceCheck row with supersedes_check_id set + fire GeofenceOverrideApplied.
Structured `geofence.override_applied` log line for compliance-grade audit trail. Persisted to audit_log by the audit module's AuditListener.
Invalidate the workspace + branch caches. Update the 'last activity' timestamp used by the RecentGeofenceActivityCheck health probe.
